_meta.description: Dependency graph (Layer 2 Track E): stem -> definition chunks the rule references but does not contain. Each rule chunk surfaced above threshold seeds + boosts these so the definitions it depends on ride into context with it. See spec/dependency-boost.md.
_meta.ratification: v1 edges are the human-validated 'spine -> core siblings' families from tests/probe_essential_set.py ESSENTIAL and the pilot GROUND_TRUTH. tests/eval_dep_boost.py asserts these reproduce. Extend via scripts/build_dep_graph.py (draft) -> hand-ratify -> add here.
_meta.invariant: depth-1 only; a seeded dep does not recursively seed its own deps.
